name: Kraken Cannon
desc: A giant kraken beam that sweeps the whole field.

name: SKOL Mech
desc: A SKOL mech escorts me — mirrors my orientation, fires alongside me, and shields me from bullets.

name: Bearzooka
desc: My SKOL gunship carpet-bombs from the sky and unloads a bullet volley — pure hell.

name: Emblem Vaults
desc: Emblem vaults orbit me, shredding nearby bullets.

name: Jungle Stampede
desc: A bull stampede tramples straight up the field.

name: Honey Badger
desc: The honey badger goes berserk — relentless damage.

name: Sixth Sense
desc: Time warps to a crawl — bullets and Mumus slow while I keep moving at full speed. I’ll weave through hell.

name: Ourbie's Revenge
desc: A wave of green black holes tears open across the field, devouring nearby bullets and Mumus.

name: Kiss Me
desc: I blow a kiss — a shockwave charms every Mumu into turning on their brethren, then bursting after 3s.

name: Unleash the Kraken
desc: Colossal tentacles erupt across the map and thrash the Mumus for 6 seconds.

name: Call of the Void
desc: I tear open reality; eldritch servitors pour out to hunt the Mumus — powerful, but they can be destroyed.
